description: A critical data spillage incident has occurred: cleartext passwords were inadvertently logged to Splunk. Remediate this using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) and terminal. Update the admin user's roles to include can_delete permissions and purge all events in the web_logs index with sourcetype=apache_leak that contain password= data, ensuring no other events are deleted. To prevent future leaks, implement an index-time masking rule in /opt/splunk/etc/system/local/props.conf for the [apache_leak] stanza using the directive SEDCMD-redact = s/password=[^&" ]+/password=REDACTED/g. Ensure all configuration and permission changes are fully active on the Splunk service.
